privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic Chrome extension named 'Bug Reporter Internal' at /home/ga/Documents/BugReporter_v2. The extension uses Manifest V3, version 2.1.0, includes a red-colored icon (48x48px), and contains a popup interface for logging QA defects. All extension files are generated programmatically during task setup via setup_task.sh.
